description: Binary pass/fail criteria for blog quality optimization loop

criteria.name: zero_banned_vocabulary
criteria.description: No AI-tell words from the 18-phrase banned list plus extended content-quality.md list

criteria.name: zero_em_dashes
criteria.description: No em dashes anywhere in the post. Use commas, periods, or rewrite.

criteria.name: burstiness_above_threshold
criteria.description: Sentence length variance (burstiness) must stay above 5.0/10

criteria.name: ai_detection_low
criteria.description: AI detection probability must stay below 30%

criteria.name: all_stats_sourced
criteria.description: Every statistic/number claim has an inline citation to a verifiable source

criteria.name: has_summary_box
criteria.description: Post contains a Key Takeaways, TL;DR, or summary box after the introduction

criteria.name: heading_hierarchy_valid
criteria.description: Headings follow H1 > H2 > H3 with no skipped levels

criteria.name: sufficient_internal_links
criteria.description: At least 3 internal links with descriptive anchor text

criteria.name: readability_in_range
criteria.description: Flesch Reading Ease between 55-75 (or per persona target)

criteria.name: has_faq_section
criteria.description: Post contains a FAQ section with 3+ questions for schema and AI citation

criteria.name: cta_present
criteria.description: At least one call-to-action matching client CTA table

scoring.note: All hard_gate criteria must pass. Non-hard-gate criteria are scored by weight.
